summary: David Kim from Aegis Cloud Security support called Keith Donovan of Nimbus Platform regarding support case 3615, which involves a feature gap in Aegis Comply around custom cross-framework reporting. Keith needs a control mapping matrix that spans SOC 2, ISO 27001, and PCI DSS in a single exportable report for auditor handoffs, which the platform does not currently support natively. David confirmed the gap, explained a manual CSV workaround that Keith's team is already using but finds unsustainable, and committed to escalating a formal feature request to the product team. David also flagged Nimbus Platform as a candidate for early access/beta programs and directed Keith to his account manager Sarah Chen for future roadmap visibility.
actionItems: David Kim: Escalate formal feature request (case 3615) to product team with full business context, cross-framework matrix format requirements, and SOC 2/ISO 27001/PCI DSS scope
David Kim: Flag Nimbus Platform as a candidate for early access and beta programs in the escalation documentation
David Kim: Send email confirmation with updated case notes to Keith Donovan after closing call documentation
Keith Donovan: Follow up with account manager Sarah Chen for periodic roadmap and feature request status updates

keyMoments.text: Keith describes the core feature gap: no native cross-framework control mapping report exists in Aegis Comply
keyMoments.speaker: Keith Donovan

keyMoments.text: Keith reveals his team already uses the manual CSV workaround but it takes hours each quarter and is error-prone, signaling process pain and scalability concern
keyMoments.speaker: Keith Donovan

keyMoments.text: Keith expresses interest in participating in a beta or early access program, indicating engagement and willingness to invest in the platform
keyMoments.speaker: Keith Donovan

keyMoments.text: Keith specifies the need for a true control mapping matrix format showing relationships across SOC 2, ISO 27001, and PCI DSS, not just concatenated lists
keyMoments.speaker: Keith Donovan
